series_metadata.series_description: Records related to public requests, including but not limited to the original request, correspondence between staff and requestor, redacted and un-redacted responsive records.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: 10 years fron the date the Auditor of State responds to the public records request ; Paper: Retain until electronic version has been created, or until no longer of administrative value, whichever first occurs, Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
